mapper.select: select bh.id, bh.user_id, bh.room_id as room_id, bh.browse_time, bh.is_deleted, ri.rent, ri.room_number, ai.name as apartment_name, ai.province_name, ai.city_name, ai.district_name from browsing_history bh left join room_info ri on ri.id = bh.room_id and ri.is_deleted = 0 left join apartment_info ai on ri.apartment_id = ai.id and ai.is_deleted = 0 where bh.user_id = #{userId} and bh.is_deleted = 0 order by bh.browse_time desc
select name, url from graph_info where is_deleted = 0 and item_id = #{room_id} and item_type = 2
